channel.title: Google Drive on Tech Tracker
channel.description: Recent content in Google Drive on Tech Tracker

item.title: How to host website on Google Drive or OneDrive for free.
item.description: <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-o9Ksyv8DsV0/YcYIX7FPgYI/AAAAAAAAIEM/4kmj4mAwpesU64dt982YC09EplLNEqxsQCNcBGAsYHQ/s1600/1640368219111785-0.png" alt=""> Well, if you want to host website then you have to buy server else you have to host your website on free hosting platforms like blogger but the major issue with free hosting platforms is limitations and restrictions, this is why people like to buy paid servers to keep everything in control, but as we all know custom servers are not free, the price for servers is based on it’s features and capacity.

item.title: How to upload files to Google Drive using Telegram bot for free.
item.description: <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-WmnHf50N3YU/YaJzwre2_zI/AAAAAAAAHlI/31D0aW9lW-85ZUTZl5kOT5Agphj9K00_QCLcBGAsYHQ/s1600/1638036409908071-0.png" alt=""> If you use telegram then most probably you know there are alot of bots available to use developed by talented developers for various purposes, with telegram bots you can fast track your work, like you can remotely upload files to telegram by just sending download link to telegram bots even upload your telegram files to cloud storage backup platforms like Google’s Drive, Mega etc and many more.

item.title: How to backup Google's Blogger content, template etc for free.
item.description: <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-ylBDJhGSPR8/YTjN99DssxI/AAAAAAAAGmY/A5oh8sEDo2IbUlhzIW0mVKblAcDfbYS8ACLcBGAsYHQ/s1600/1631112686264170-0.png" alt=""> If you have website or blog on blogger you probably know blogger doesn’t have tools or plugins to backup content, template etc while in wordpress we have many plugins to backup content but most blogger users don’t know Google have a official website where you can backup your blogger blog or website to your Google Drive or get a download link to your e-mail for free. It is very important to Backup your blog or website either it is hosted or wordpress or blogger so that when you lost your content or template for whatever reason a backup will help you restore them and will save all your hard work so kindly always backup your blog or website frequently.
